buy().notice: Buy tokens from bonding curve. Send ETH to cover cost + fees.         msg.value must be >= totalCharged. Excess refunded.

sell(uint256,uint256).notice: Sell tokens back to bonding curve.

simulateBuy(uint256).notice: Simulate buy of `amount` tokens — returns (cost, creatorFee, platformFee, total)

simulateSell(uint256).notice: Simulate sell of `amount` tokens — returns (returnAmt, creatorFee, platformFee, netReturn)
